explanation: This LTL formula captures the idea that whenever there is an information request from the user, the robot should eventually provide a detailed explanation of the path it intends to take.
This LTL formula captures the requirement that the robot should always provide a detailed explanation for any chosen path, especially if there's an explicit request for information by the user.
This property ensures that upon an information request by the user, the robot explains why it has chosen the specific path over others, providing detailed reasoning.
Whenever the user requests information, the system should ensure that the robot provides a detailed reason explaining its chosen path over others.
Ensures that if an information request is made, the robot will eventually provide detailed explanations for the current path it is following.
This LTL formula ensures that if information is requested, the robot should eventually provide a detailed explanation for its current path.
Ensures that upon an information request, the robot gives a detailed explanation of why it chose the current path, addressing why other valid routes were not selected.
Guarantees that if the user asks for information, the robot must eventually provide a detailed explanation regarding the path it is currently following, along with the reasons for its choice.
If the user requests information, the system ensures that a detailed explanation will be given on the reason behind the chosen path, emphasizing any deviations from other potential routes.
This expression guarantees that when information is requested, the system should provide a detailed explanation on the planned path along with reasons for choosing it over others.

Ensures that upon a user request for information, the robot provides a detailed explanation of the current path, addressing the reasons behind its selection.
Upon an information request, the robot must ensure eventually explaining the planned path, why it was chosen over others, delivering details and justifications.

This formula captures that if a user requests information, the robot should give a detailed explanation of why it chose a specific path over other available paths.
Whenever an information request is made, the robot should provide a complete explanation for its chosen path, with detailed reasoning compared to other options.

After a user requests information, the robot should provide a thorough explanation on its path choice, including the reasoning for not selecting other potential routes.

This guarantees that with any user information request, the robot provides a detailed account explaining its current path and contrasting it with other potential options.
For each information request, this LTL expression ensures that the robot offers a detailed rationale on the path it has chosen, emphasizing comparison with other alternatives.
When an information request occurs, the robot must eventually deliver a detailed explanation on its chosen path over others.
Ensures that whenever an information request arises, the robot explicates its path choice, delivering detailed reasoning as to why it didn't choose other possible routes.
